languages.text: Мастер-код управления вратами найден. Стоит сообщить об этом Ювенне.

traits.locale_text: Мастер-код управления вратами найден. Стоит сообщить об этом Ювенне.

languages.text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.
languages.original_text: Мастер-код управления вратами найден. Стоит сообщить об этом Ювенне.

traits.locale_text: The master code for the gate's control has been found. Juvenna should be informed.
The master code for the gate's control has been found. Juvenna should be informed.
The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.
The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

languages.text: Der Hauptcode für das Tor wurde gefunden. Juvenna sollte informiert werden.
languages.original_text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

traits.locale_text: Der Hauptcode für das Tor wurde gefunden. Juvenna sollte informiert werden.

languages.text: Le code qui permet de contrôler la porte a été découvert. Il faut en informer Juvenna.
languages.original_text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

traits.locale_text: Le code qui permet de contrôler la porte a été découvert. Il faut en informer Juvenna.

languages.text: 大门的主控代码已经找到。需将此事告知尤文娜。
languages.original_text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

traits.locale_text: 大门的主控代码已经找到。需将此事告知尤文娜。

languages.text: Se ha descubierto el código maestro de la puerta. Hay que informar de ello a Juvenna.
languages.original_text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

traits.locale_text: Se ha descubierto el código maestro de la puerta. Hay que informar de ello a Juvenna.

languages.text: ゲートを制御するマスターコードが見つかった。ジュウェンナに報告し、オルドスに渡してもらうといいだろう。
languages.original_text: The master code to control the gate has been found. It's worth reporting it to Juwenna so she can give it to Ordos.

languages.text: Geçidin ana şifresi bulundu. Juvenna'ya haber verilmeli.
languages.original_text: The master code for the gate has been found. Juvenna should be informed.

traits.locale_text: Geçidin ana şifresi bulundu. Juvenna'ya haber verilmeli.
